title: CMR Tag Fidelity (0x96)
description: CMR tag fidelity triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

enumMap.01: Stop presentation at point of first CMR tag exception and report exception
enumMap.02: Do not stop presentation because of CMR tag exceptions; ignore tag and continue processing CMR tags

elements.name: RepCMREx
elements.description: CMR tag exception reporting rule if exception does not stop presentation

enumMap.02: Do not report CMR tag exception
